name: Marina Safwat Abdeltawab Gabriel

projects.name: Smart Players Monitoring System
projects.description: Engineered a real-time monitoring system using wearable electrocardiogram and motion sensors to capture structured health data during matches.

projects.name: Sales Data Analysis & Engineering
projects.description: Developed a Python-based ETL pipeline to extract, clean, and load multi-source data into SQL Server.

projects.name: Dialogue Summarization Application (NLP)
projects.description: Designed an end-to-end abstractive summarization pipeline and benchmarked GPT-2, T5, Pegasus, and BART on dialogue datasets.

projects.name: Energy Consumption Optimization
projects.description: Analyzed regional energy consumption datasets to reveal inefficiencies and usage patterns.

projects.name: 3D MRI Brain Tumor Segmentation
projects.description: Built and trained a 3D-UNet model on MRI scans (4,000+ images) for volumetric tumor segmentation.

projects.name: Climate Change Impact — Flight Emissions
projects.description: Evaluated historical flight emission data and designed regression models to forecast long-term global environmental impact.

summary: An Artificial Intelligence Engineer with hands-on experience in end-to-end machine learning pipelines, computer vision, natural language processing, and cloud integration.
strengths: Strong Python, data science, and software engineering skills
Experience with machine learning pipelines and cloud integration
Passionate about applying AI to drive automation and real-world business impact
